NEW
Introducing Simple Swap

Our easiest to use product yet. No more slippage. No more native gas tokens to swap. Only one all-inclusive, best-in-class, guaranteed rate to keep things… simple.

NEW

We've secured all holders. Snapshot has been completed for all holders before the announcement, we want everyone who hold their token on a wallet, We have made a snapshot of all wallet addresses that purchased the token and will make sure everyone get their token Rewards. Now All holders Should go ahead and confirm wallet was added to the snapshot, all holders on exchange will get an update from the exchange
